description:
A standalone Audible downloader and decrypter

Oahu is an Audible downloader app for Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Features include direct download from the Audible server, sign-in via standard web browser,
library browsing with title selection, download and conversion to plain .m4b files,
detailed progress monitoring, and optional export as .aax files.
This is the first release of Oahu that ships the new CLI/TUI as well as the Avalonia (GUI) app!
What's Changed
- New oahu-cli with TUI design system, command-mode foundation, auth and library commands
- Download, convert, and serve commands with dry-run, force, concurrency, and quiet options
- TUI shell with tabs, logs overlay, progressive Ctrl+C, screens, sign-in flow, and modal system
- Queue, Jobs, and History TUI screens
- Various bug fixes including Windows-specific CLI fixes and library refresh on startup
Full Changelog: v1.0.44...v1.1.1
